variables.$fxv#0:
<!--
  APIM API Policy - Azure AI Foundry Proxy
  =========================================
  inbound:
    1. Named Value をローカル変数にセット
    2. IP CIDR フィルタリング
    3. JWT 検証 (Entra ID)
    4. JWT クレーム取得 (oid / upn / tid)
    5. OID 許可判定
    6. ログ用変数設定
    7. Managed Identity による Foundry 認証
  outbound:
    1. レスポンスボディからトークン使用量を抽出
    2. 監査ログ出力 (Application Insights trace)
  on-error:
    1. エラーログ出力
-->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />

    <!-- Named Value をローカル変数にセット -->
    <set-variable name="allowedOids" value="{{allowed-oids}}" />
    <set-variable name="allowedCidrs" value="{{allowed-cidrs}}" />

    <!-- ============================================================
         IP フィルタリング (CIDR)
         allowedCidrs は "10.0.0.0/8;192.168.1.0/24" 形式
         ============================================================ -->
    <set-variable name="ipAllowed" value="@{
      try {
        var rawIp = context.Request.IpAddress;
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(rawIp)) return false;
        var clientIp = System.Net.IPAddress.Parse(rawIp);
        if (clientIp.AddressFamily != System.Net.Sockets.AddressFamily.InterNetwork) return false;
        var cidrs = ((string)context.Variables["allowedCidrs"]).Split(';');
        foreach (var entry in cidrs) {
          var cidr = entry.Trim();
          if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(cidr)) continue;
          var slash = cidr.IndexOf('/');
          if (slash < 0) {
            if (cidr == rawIp) return true;
            continue;
          }
          var networkAddr = System.Net.IPAddress.Parse(cidr.Substring(0, slash));
          int prefixLen = int.Parse(cidr.Substring(slash + 1));
          if (prefixLen == 0) return true;
          var nb = networkAddr.GetAddressBytes();
          var cb = clientIp.GetAddressBytes();
          if (nb.Length != 4 || cb.Length != 4) continue;
          uint mask = 0xFFFFFFFFu << (32 - prefixLen);
          uint netInt = ((uint)nb[0] << 24) | ((uint)nb[1] << 16) | ((uint)nb[2] << 8) | nb[3];
          uint cipInt = ((uint)cb[0] << 24) | ((uint)cb[1] << 16) | ((uint)cb[2] << 8) | cb[3];
          if ((cipInt & mask) == (netInt & mask)) return true;
        }
        return false;
      } catch {
        return false;
      }
    }" />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(!((bool)context.Variables["ipAllowed"]))">
        <return-response>
          <set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" />
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>application/json</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body>{"error":{"code":"403","message":"Access denied: IP address not allowed"}}</set-body>
        </return-response>
      </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- ============================================================
         JWT 検証 (Entra ID v2)
         audience 制限なし (FR-003)
         ============================================================ -->
    <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization"
                  failed-validation-httpcode="401"
                  failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized: Invalid or missing Bearer token">
      <openid-config url="https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{tenant-id}}/v2.0/.well-known/openid-configuration" />
      <issuers>
        <issuer>https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{tenant-id}}/v2.0</issuer>
        <issuer>https://sts.windows.net/{{tenant-id}}/</issuer>
      </issuers>
      <required-claims>
        <claim name="oid" />
      </required-claims>
    </validate-jwt>

    <!-- ============================================================
         JWT クレーム取得
         認証後、MI 認証で Authorization ヘッダーが上書きされる前に取得する
         ============================================================ -->
    <set-variable name="oid" value="@{
      try {
        var h = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", "");
        var t = h.StartsWith("Bearer ") ? h.Substring(7) : h;
        return t.AsJwt()?.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("oid", "") ?? "";
      } catch { return ""; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="upn" value="@{
      try {
        var h = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", "");
        var t = h.StartsWith("Bearer ") ? h.Substring(7) : h;
        var jwt = t.AsJwt();
        var v = jwt?.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("upn", "") ?? "";
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(v)) v = jwt?.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("preferred_username", "") ?? "";
        return v;
      } catch { return ""; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="claimTid" value="@{
      try {
        var h = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", "");
        var t = h.StartsWith("Bearer ") ? h.Substring(7) : h;
        return t.AsJwt()?.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("tid", "") ?? "";
      } catch { return ""; }
    }" />

    <!-- ============================================================
         OID 許可判定 (FR-003)
         allowedOids は "oid1;oid2;oid3" 形式
         ============================================================ -->
    <set-variable name="oidAuthorized" value="@{
      var oid = (string)context.Variables["oid"];
      if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(oid)) return false;
      var list = ((string)context.Variables["allowedOids"]).Split(';');
      foreach (var entry in list) {
        if (entry.Trim() == oid) return true;
      }
      return false;
    }" />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(!((bool)context.Variables["oidAuthorized"]))">
        <return-response>
          <set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" />
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>application/json</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body>{"error":{"code":"403","message":"Access denied: User not authorized"}}</set-body>
        </return-response>
      </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- ============================================================
         ログ用変数設定 (AU-002)
         ============================================================ -->
    <set-variable name="requestId" value="@(context.RequestId.ToString())" />
    <set-variable name="requestTimestamp" value="@(DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"))" />
    <set-variable name="applicationId" value="@{
      try {
        var h = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", "");
        var t = h.StartsWith("Bearer ") ? h.Substring(7) : h;
        var jwt = t.AsJwt();
        return jwt?.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("appid", "") ?? jwt?.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("azp", "") ?? "";
      } catch { return ""; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="subscriptionId" value="@(context.Subscription != null ? context.Subscription.Id : "")" />

    <!-- ============================================================
         Managed Identity による Foundry 認証 (FR-004 / SEC-003)
         Authorization ヘッダーを MI トークンで上書きする
         ============================================================ -->
    <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com/" client-id="{{managed-identity-client-id}}" />

  </inbound>

  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>

  <outbound>
    <base />

    <!-- ============================================================
         レスポンスボディ読み取り (JSON のみ)
         ============================================================ -->
    <set-variable name="responseBody" value="@{
      try {
        var ct = context.Response.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Content-Type", "");
        if (ct.Contains("application/json")) {
          return context.Response.Body.As<string>(preserveContent: true);
        }
        return "{}";
      } catch { return "{}"; }
    }" />

    <!-- ============================================================
         トークン使用量の抽出 (AU-003)
         ============================================================ -->
    <set-variable name="promptTokens" value="@{
      try {
        return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject
          .Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["usage"]
          ?["prompt_tokens"]?.ToString() ?? "0";
      } catch { return "0"; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="completionTokens" value="@{
      try {
        return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject
          .Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["usage"]
          ?["completion_tokens"]?.ToString() ?? "0";
      } catch { return "0"; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="totalTokens" value="@{
      try {
        return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject
          .Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["usage"]
          ?["total_tokens"]?.ToString() ?? "0";
      } catch { return "0"; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="llmModel" value="@{
      try {
        return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject
          .Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["model"]
          ?.ToString() ?? "";
      } catch { return ""; }
    }" />
    <set-variable name="deploymentName" value="@{
      try {
        var path = context.Request.Url.Path;
        var parts = path.Split('/');
        int idx = System.Array.IndexOf(parts, "deployments");
        return (idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < parts.Length) ? parts[idx + 1] : "";
      } catch { return ""; }
    }" />

    <!-- ============================================================
         監査ログ出力 (AU-002 / AU-003)
         Application Insights trace テーブルに記録される
         ============================================================ -->
    <trace source="ai-agent-audit" severity="information">
      <message>@{
        return new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject(
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("event", "llm-api-call"),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", context.Variables["requestId"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", context.Variables["requestTimestamp"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", context.Variables["oid"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("upn", context.Variables["upn"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("tenantId", context.Variables["claimTid"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("httpStatus", context.Response.StatusCode),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("durationMs", context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("promptTokens", context.Variables["promptTokens"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("completionTokens", context.Variables["completionTokens"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("totalTokens", context.Variables["totalTokens"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("modelName", context.Variables["llmModel"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("deploymentName", context.Variables["deploymentName"])
        ).ToString();
      }</message>
    </trace>

    <!-- ============================================================
         HTTP Trigger への監査ログ POST 送信 (AU-001)
         ============================================================ -->
    <send-one-way-request mode="new">
      <set-url>{{audit-log-url}}</set-url>
      <set-method>POST</set-method>
      <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
        <value>application/json</value>
      </set-header>
      <set-header name="x-api-key" exists-action="override">
        <value>{{audit-api-key}}</value>
      </set-header>
      <set-body>@{
        return new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject(
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", context.Variables["requestTimestamp"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", context.Variables["requestId"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", context.Variables["oid"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("applicationId", context.Variables["applicationId"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("subscriptionId", context.Variables["subscriptionId"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("deployment", context.Variables["deploymentName"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("model", context.Variables["llmModel"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("promptTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["promptTokens"])),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("completionTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["completionTokens"])),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("totalTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["totalTokens"])),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("responseTimeMs", (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("statusCode", context.Response.StatusCode)
        ).ToString();
      }</set-body>
    </send-one-way-request>

  </outbound>

  <on-error>
    <base />

    <!-- ============================================================
         エラーログ出力
         ============================================================ -->
    <trace source="ai-agent-error" severity="error">
      <message>@{
        return new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject(
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("event", "error"),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", context.RequestId),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", context.Variables.ContainsKey("oid") ? context.Variables["oid"] : ""),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("errorSource", context.LastError.Source),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("errorReason", context.LastError.Reason),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("errorMessage", context.LastError.Message),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("errorScope", context.LastError.Scope)
        ).ToString();
      }</message>
    </trace>

    <!-- ============================================================
         HTTP Trigger へのエラーログ POST 送信 (AU-001)
         ============================================================ -->
    <send-one-way-request mode="new">
      <set-url>{{audit-log-url}}</set-url>
      <set-method>POST</set-method>
      <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
        <value>application/json</value>
      </set-header>
      <set-header name="x-api-key" exists-action="override">
        <value>{{audit-api-key}}</value>
      </set-header>
      <set-body>@{
        var timestamp = context.Variables.ContainsKey("requestTimestamp") ? (string)context.Variables["requestTimestamp"] : DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
        var requestId = context.Variables.ContainsKey("requestId") ? (string)context.Variables["requestId"] : context.RequestId.ToString();
        var oid = context.Variables.ContainsKey("oid") ? (string)context.Variables["oid"] : "";
        var appId = context.Variables.ContainsKey("applicationId") ? (string)context.Variables["applicationId"] : "";
        var subId = context.Variables.ContainsKey("subscriptionId") ? (string)context.Variables["subscriptionId"] : "";
        var deployment = context.Variables.ContainsKey("deploymentName") ? (string)context.Variables["deploymentName"] : "";
        var model = context.Variables.ContainsKey("llmModel") ? (string)context.Variables["llmModel"] : "";
        var promptTokens = context.Variables.ContainsKey("promptTokens") ? int.Parse((string)context.Variables["promptTokens"]) : 0;
        var completionTokens = context.Variables.ContainsKey("completionTokens") ? int.Parse((string)context.Variables["completionTokens"]) : 0;
        var totalTokens = context.Variables.ContainsKey("totalTokens") ? int.Parse((string)context.Variables["totalTokens"]) : 0;
        var statusCode = context.Response != null ? context.Response.StatusCode : 500;
        var responseTimeMs = (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds;

        return new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject(
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", timestamp),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", requestId),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", oid),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("applicationId", appId),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("subscriptionId", subId),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("deployment", deployment),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("model", model),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("promptTokens", promptTokens),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("completionTokens", completionTokens),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("totalTokens", totalTokens),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("responseTimeMs", responseTimeMs),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("statusCode", statusCode)
        ).ToString();
      }</set-body>
    </send-one-way-request>

  </on-error>
</policies>

content.json:
# Azure OpenAI 利用監査ダッシュボード
APIMおよびAzure Functionsのログから取得したLLMの利用統計情報です。

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend StatusCode = toint(msg.statusCode)
| summarize TotalRequests = count(), ErrorRequests = countif(StatusCode >= 400)
| extend SuccessRate = round(todouble(TotalRequests - ErrorRequests) * 100.0 / TotalRequests, 2)
| project TotalRequests, ErrorRequests, SuccessRate = strcat(SuccessRate, "%")
content.title: 全体の概要統計 (リクエスト数 / エラー数 / 成功率)

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend Timestamp = todatetime(msg.timestamp),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(TotalTokens) by bin(Timestamp, 1d)
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: 日次 Token 利用推移

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend OID = tostring(msg.oid),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalUsage = sum(TotalTokens) by OID
| order by TotalUsage desc
content.title: ユーザー別 (OID) 累積 Token 利用量

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend Model = tostring(msg.model),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalUsage = sum(TotalTokens) by Model
| order by TotalUsage desc
content.title: モデル別利用比率

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend ResponseTimeMs = toint(msg.responseTimeMs)
| summarize Avg = avg(ResponseTimeMs), P50 = percentile(ResponseTimeMs, 50), P90 = percentile(ResponseTimeMs, 90), P99 = percentile(ResponseTimeMs, 99)
content.title: 応答速度分析 (ミリ秒)

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend OID = tostring(msg.oid),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalUsage = sum(TotalTokens), RequestCount = count() by OID
| order by TotalUsage desc
| limit 10
content.title: Top 利用者 (上位 10 名)
